response: To expedite the registration of a Avatrombopag medicinal product in Russia and streamline the process of conducting bioequivalence studies, we propose organizing an international clinical trial that includes Russia as an additional site for patient recruitment. For this, we require the following from your team: 1. Access to the complete clinical trial protocol currently employed in India, allowing us to align our methodologies and ensure consistency in data collection and analysis. 2. Results and data from the bioequivalence studies performed with your participants, which will serve as a reference point for our integrated analysis. Using the combined data, we will generate a summary report for the clinical trial, intended for registration in Russia.
